summary: Recent updates in the Media Sink area of Firefox have introduced the use of **MOZ_LOG_FMT**, a logging format that enhances how the browser records information about media events and errors related to audio and video playback. This change matters because it will help developers more easily pinpoint issues, leading to improvements in the reliability and performance of media features like streaming and playback. Better logging means a smoother experience for users, particularly when using services that rely on smooth audio and video, like online streaming platforms.
